reviews.review_title: This is the best fan game ever
reviews.review_description: There is good mods and really good cosmetics but some of the cosmetics are over priced and there's no more inf shiny rocks and the goose hat and the others don't work you can't buy it but other than that this game is good

The game is really good, and the game has mods, quite a bit of mods! I just don't like people using EXETREME LONG ARMS thinking, "Oh, I'm so good at the game, I can flick tag you from 3 ft away" blah blah I'll deal with it. But otherwise, THE GAME IS SO GOOD I PLAY IT EVERYDAY WITH MY BROTHER JELLY!!!!!

I love the nice community and people in this game, I love the mod menus and the ability to use map changers right from stump. I do have to say that the moderation and reporting system does not work, I was in a lobby the other day and there was a kid saying slurs and cussing this little kid out, and so literally everyone reported him, and guess what happens. n o t h i n g. So please Project Blaze, Fix your moderation. But in all it's a pretty fun game. 🙂👍
